cards.front: 11.1 - What is the primary purpose of the Data Link Layer?
cards.back: To provide error-free transfer of data frames between two devices on the same network.

cards.front: 11.2 - What type of codes are used for error detection in the Data Link Layer?
11.3 - What is the main difference between Cyclic Codes and Block Codes?
cards.back: Block Codes are used for error detection and correction, while Cyclic Codes are used only for error detection.

cards.front: 11.4 - What is the advantage of using Cyclic Codes over Block Codes?
cards.back: Cyclic Codes are simpler to generate and can be more efficient in terms of computational power.
